title: oxytropis campestris var. minor
intro: Oxytropis campestris var. minor, also known as the mountain milkvetch, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Oxytropis campestris var. minor include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
